subject: Chemistry

learning_objectives.statement: Represent a balanced redox reaction equation using half-reactions.
Balanced chemical equations for redox reactions can be constructed from half-reactions.

depth_profile: The topic focuses strictly on the construction and representation of balanced chemical equations for oxidation-reduction (redox) reactions by combining and balancing half-reactions.
assessment_notes: This topic is assessed under the 'Mathematical Routines' practice (Skill 5.E). Students will be expected to determine a balanced chemical equation for a given chemical phenomenon. On the AP Exam, students must demonstrate proficiency in writing and balancing chemical equations.

spec_checklist.can_do: I can represent a balanced redox reaction equation using half-reactions.
I can construct balanced chemical equations for redox reactions from half-reactions.

spec_source_citation: AP Chemistry Course and Exam Description, Course Framework V.1
